title: Add a /health endpoint that returns 200 plus the git SHA
goal: Add a /health HTTP endpoint to the fixture web app. It should return 200 with a JSON body {"status":"ok","sha":"<current git short SHA>"}. Include a unit test.
notes: Smoke test. C1 (single super-agent) and C3 (multi-agent, no HITL) should both succeed quickly. Used to baseline performance and to validate the harness end-to-end before scored runs.
